allow: Bash(node -e "import\(''./src/core/utils/rideCalculator.js''\).then\(m => { console.log\(''low_vol:'', JSON.stringify\(m.isDemandPeak\({ rideRequests: 2, availableDrivers: 1, requestVelocity: 2 }\)\)\); console.log\(''high_vol:'', JSON.stringify\(m.isDemandPeak\({ rideRequests: 15, availableDrivers: 8, requestVelocity: 20 }\)\)\); console.log\(''3req_1drv:'', JSON.stringify\(m.isDemandPeak\({ rideRequests: 3, availableDrivers: 1, requestVelocity: 3 }\)\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message, e.stack\)\);")

Bash(node -e "import\(''./src/core/utils/rideCalculator.js''\).then\(m => { const c1 = m.detectPeak\({ rideRequests: 2, availableDrivers: 1, requestVelocity: 2 }\); console.log\(''combined_low:'', JSON.stringify\(c1\)\); const c2 = m.detectPeak\({ rideRequests: 15, availableDrivers: 8, requestVelocity: 20 }\); console.log\(''combined_high:'', JSON.stringify\(c2\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message, e.stack\)\);")

Bash(node -e "import\(''./src/core/utils/rideCalculator.js''\).then\(m => { const e1 = m.calculateEstimatedFare\({ vehicleType:''auto'', distanceKm:10, estimatedDurationMinutes:25, pickupDistanceKm:3, driverDailyRideCount:5, rideRequests:15, availableDrivers:8, requestVelocity:20 }\); console.log\(''HIGH:'', ''fare='' + e1.passenger.estimatedFare, ''surge='' + e1.passenger.surgeMultiplier, ''peak='' + e1.passenger.isPeak, ''reason='' + e1.passenger.peakReason\); const e2 = m.calculateEstimatedFare\({ vehicleType:''auto'', distanceKm:10, estimatedDurationMinutes:25, pickupDistanceKm:1, driverDailyRideCount:2, rideRequests:2, availableDrivers:1, requestVelocity:2 }\); console.log\(''LOW:'', ''fare='' + e2.passenger.estimatedFare, ''surge='' + e2.passenger.surgeMultiplier, ''peak='' + e2.passenger.isPeak, ''reason='' + e2.passenger.peakReason, ''vol='' + e2.signals.hasSufficientVolume\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\);")

Bash(node -e "import\(''./src/core/utils/rideCalculator.js''\).then\(m => { const t1 = m.calculateEstimatedFare\({ vehicleType:''auto'', distanceKm:10, estimatedDurationMinutes:24, pickupDistanceKm:1.5, driverDailyRideCount:3, rideRequests:3, availableDrivers:10, requestVelocity:2 }\); console.log\(''TC1_P:'' + JSON.stringify\(t1.passenger\)\); console.log\(''TC1_D:'' + JSON.stringify\(t1.driver\)\); console.log\(''TC1_S:'' + JSON.stringify\(t1.signals\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e\)\);")

Bash(node -e "import\(''./src/core/utils/rideCalculator.js''\).then\(m => { const f = m.calculateFinalRideFare\({ vehicleType:''auto'', distanceKm:10, estimatedDurationMinutes:24, actualDurationMinutes:30, waitedMinutes:5, surgeMultiplier:1, pickupDistanceKm:1.5, driverDailyRideCount:3 }\); console.log\(''TC1F_P:'' + JSON.stringify\(f.passenger\)\); console.log\(''TC1F_D:'' + JSON.stringify\(f.driver\)\); console.log\(''TC1F_W:'' + JSON.stringify\(f.meta.waiting\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e\)\);")

Bash(node -e "import\(''./src/core/utils/rideCalculator.js''\).then\(m => { const t2 = m.calculateEstimatedFare\({ vehicleType:''bike'', distanceKm:5, estimatedDurationMinutes:10, pickupDistanceKm:4, driverDailyRideCount:8, rideRequests:20, availableDrivers:10, requestVelocity:25 }\); console.log\(''TC2_P:'' + JSON.stringify\(t2.passenger\)\); console.log\(''TC2_D:'' + JSON.stringify\(t2.driver\)\); console.log\(''TC2_S:'' + JSON.stringify\(t2.signals\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e\)\);")

Bash(node -e "import\(''./src/core/utils/rideCalculator.js''\).then\(m => { const f = m.calculateFinalRideFare\({ vehicleType:''bike'', distanceKm:5, estimatedDurationMinutes:10, actualDurationMinutes:15, waitedMinutes:8, surgeMultiplier:1.28, pickupDistanceKm:4, driverDailyRideCount:8 }\); console.log\(''TC2F_P:'' + JSON.stringify\(f.passenger\)\); console.log\(''TC2F_D:'' + JSON.stringify\(f.driver\)\); console.log\(''TC2F_W:'' + JSON.stringify\(f.meta.waiting\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e\)\);")

Bash(node -e "import\(''./src/core/utils/rideCalculator.js''\).then\(m => { const t3 = m.calculateEstimatedFare\({ vehicleType:''car'', distanceKm:25, estimatedDurationMinutes:43, pickupDistanceKm:5, driverDailyRideCount:12, rideRequests:30, availableDrivers:10, requestVelocity:30 }\); console.log\(''TC3_P:'' + JSON.stringify\(t3.passenger\)\); console.log\(''TC3_D:'' + JSON.stringify\(t3.driver\)\); console.log\(''TC3_S:'' + JSON.stringify\(t3.signals\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e\)\);")

Bash(node -e "import\(''./src/core/utils/rideCalculator.js''\).then\(m => { const f = m.calculateFinalRideFare\({ vehicleType:''car'', distanceKm:25, estimatedDurationMinutes:43, actualDurationMinutes:90, waitedMinutes:2, surgeMultiplier:1.75, pickupDistanceKm:5, driverDailyRideCount:12 }\); console.log\(''TC3F_P:'' + JSON.stringify\(f.passenger\)\); console.log\(''TC3F_D:'' + JSON.stringify\(f.driver\)\); console.log\(''TC3F_T:'' + JSON.stringify\(f.meta.traffic\)\); console.log\(''TC3F_W:'' + JSON.stringify\(f.meta.waiting\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e\)\);")

Bash(node -e "import\(''./src/core/utils/rideCalculator.js''\).then\(m => { const noWeather = m.calculateEstimatedFare\({ vehicleType:''auto'', distanceKm:10, estimatedDurationMinutes:24, rideRequests:3, availableDrivers:10, requestVelocity:2 }\); console.log\(''NO_WEATHER: fare='' + noWeather.passenger.estimatedFare + '' surge='' + noWeather.passenger.surgeMultiplier + '' peak='' + noWeather.signals.peakReason\); const rain = m.calculateEstimatedFare\({ vehicleType:''auto'', distanceKm:10, estimatedDurationMinutes:24, rideRequests:3, availableDrivers:10, requestVelocity:2, weatherSignal:{ isWeatherPeak:true, weatherCondition:''Rain'', severity:''mild'', weatherSurge:1.1 } }\); console.log\(''RAIN: fare='' + rain.passenger.estimatedFare + '' surge='' + rain.passenger.surgeMultiplier + '' peak='' + rain.signals.peakReason + '' weather='' + rain.signals.weatherCondition\); const storm = m.calculateEstimatedFare\({ vehicleType:''auto'', distanceKm:10, estimatedDurationMinutes:24, rideRequests:3, availableDrivers:10, requestVelocity:2, weatherSignal:{ isWeatherPeak:true, weatherCondition:''Thunderstorm'', severity:''severe'', weatherSurge:1.25 } }\); console.log\(''STORM: fare='' + storm.passenger.estimatedFare + '' surge='' + storm.passenger.surgeMultiplier + '' peak='' + storm.signals.peakReason + '' weather='' + storm.signals.weatherCondition\); const demandPlusRain = m.calculateEstimatedFare\({ vehicleType:''auto'', distanceKm:10, estimatedDurationMinutes:24, rideRequests:15, availableDrivers:8, requestVelocity:20, weatherSignal:{ isWeatherPeak:true, weatherCondition:''Rain'', severity:''mild'', weatherSurge:1.1 } }\); console.log\(''DEMAND+RAIN: fare='' + demandPlusRain.passenger.estimatedFare + '' surge='' + demandPlusRain.passenger.surgeMultiplier + '' demandSurge='' + demandPlusRain.signals.demandSurge + '' weatherSurge='' + demandPlusRain.signals.weatherSurge\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\);")
